tomee.Resource: JdbcDriver org.postgresql.Driver JdbcUrl jdbc:postgresql://database.mui-db:5432/postgres?currentSchema=tomee&assumeMinServerVersion=10 maxTotal 10 maxActive 10 maxIdle 10 minIdle 3 minEvictableIdleTime = 1 timeBetweenEvictionRuns = 10000 validationQuery = SELECT 1 UserName tomee Password tomee serviceId authenticator LogSql true maxConnLifetimeMillis 180000 removeAbandonedOnMaintenance true logAbandoned true
